name: feat-ESE-0021-08
title: Tilemap perf: grid growth fixed camera until 40fps
description: Performance test: start with a small tilemap grid, grow it each frame but keep the camera fixed (only a portion of the grid is visible). Measure real-world FPS. This tests offscreen tile culling and chunk loading — FPS should degrade more slowly than the zoom-out test since most tiles are offscreen.
demoDeliverable: Performance chart showing grid size vs FPS with fixed camera, 40fps threshold marked.
